text: Stream of Mist - attacks entities with a beam attack, dealing a mist effect to them.
Mist lifting - applies fog effect to the nearest entities within 12 blocks radius.
Misty invisibility - makes the player invisible when using this ability for 15 seconds.
$(o)Condition:$() In humid biome or near water.
Condensation: 10% chance to negate 100% of incoming damage; grants "Invisibility" while sneaking.
Morning Dew: At dawn, gain "Regeneration II" for 15 sec (once per 45 sec).
